---
title: 'llegir module interpretation report'
date: '`r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")`'
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
params:
  interps: !r NULL
  packets: !r NULL
  desc: !r NULL
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

interps <- params$interps
packets <- params$packets
desc <- params$desc

# module order is driven by the interpretations; a packet with no matching
# interpretation is skipped rather than rendered evidence-only
module_ids <- names(interps)

# fragment types whose compact_summary is just a truncated preview of the
# exact same rows the top_findings table already shows in full (a plain
# name/term list with no aggregate statistic beyond the table, e.g. 'top 30
# genes by kME: FCGBP, A2M, ...') -- redundant once the table renders, so
# skipped for these types when a table is available (see the modules loop
# below); state_expression/categorical_association/cross_condition_delta
# summaries carry an omnibus stat or contrast label the table doesn't repeat,
# so they're always kept
redundant_summary_types <- c('ranked_genes', 'geneset_enrichment', 'signature_correlation')

# flatten one fragment's top_findings (a list of named lists, one per salient
# item) into a character data.frame for a clean kable, coercing every cell to a
# scalar string so ragged / nested entries never break the table
findings_table <- function(top_findings) {
    if (length(top_findings) == 0) return(NULL)
    rows <- lapply(top_findings, function(item) {
        vals <- lapply(item, function(v) {
            if (length(v) == 0) return(NA_character_)
            paste(format(v, digits = 3), collapse = ', ')
        })
        as.data.frame(vals, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
    })
    dplyr::bind_rows(rows)
}

# report-only rendering of a dataset_description: one labeled line per
# attribute, since the compact bullet text from render_dataset_description()
# is built for the LLM prompt and bunches together when emitted as raw asis
desc_line <- function(label, value) {
    if (is.null(value) || length(value) == 0 || all(is.na(value)) || !any(nzchar(trimws(value)))) return(NULL)
    paste0('<div><strong>', label, ':</strong> ', paste(value, collapse = ', '), '</div>')
}

render_desc_html <- function(desc) {
    lines <- c(
        desc_line('Species', desc$species),
        desc_line('Tissue', desc$tissue),
        desc_line('Cell Compartment', desc$cell_compartment),
        desc_line('Assay', desc$assay),
        desc_line('Conditions', desc$conditions),
        desc_line('Module Method', desc$module_method),
        desc_line('Notes', desc$notes)
    )
    paste(lines, collapse = '\n')
}
```

## Dataset

```{r dataset, results = 'asis'}
cat(render_desc_html(desc))
```

# Modules {.tabset .tabset-fade}

```{r modules, results = 'asis'}
for (module_id in module_ids) {
    interp <- interps[[module_id]]
    packet <- packets[[module_id]]

    cat('\n\n## ', module_id, ' — ', interp$proposed_label, '\n\n', sep = '')
    cat('*', interp$one_line_summary, '*\n\n', sep = '')

    cat('### Synthesized Biological Interpretation\n\n')
    cat('**Dominant biology.** ', interp$dominant_biology, '\n\n', sep = '')

    if (!is.null(interp$cell_state) && !is.na(interp$cell_state)) {
        cat('**Cell state.** ', interp$cell_state, '\n\n', sep = '')
    }
    if (!is.null(interp$condition_dynamics) && !is.na(interp$condition_dynamics)) {
        cat('**Condition dynamics.** ', interp$condition_dynamics, '\n\n', sep = '')
    }

    if (length(interp$supporting_claims) > 0) {
        cat('**Supporting evidence.**\n\n')
        for (claim in interp$supporting_claims) {
            cat('- ', claim$claim,
                ' (', paste(claim$fragment_ids, collapse = ', '),
                '; direction: ', claim$direction, ')\n', sep = '')
        }
        cat('\n')
    }

    if (length(interp$metadata_associations) > 0) {
        cat('**Metadata associations.**\n\n')
        for (assoc in interp$metadata_associations) {
            cat('- ', assoc$variable, ': ', assoc$summary,
                ' (', assoc$fragment_id, ')\n', sep = '')
        }
        cat('\n')
    }

    cat('**Confidence.** ', sprintf('%.2f', interp$confidence$score),
        ' — ', interp$confidence$rationale, '\n\n', sep = '')
    if (length(interp$flags) > 0) {
        cat('**Flags.** ', paste(unlist(interp$flags), collapse = ', '), '\n\n', sep = '')
    }

    #-----------------------------------------------------------
    # deterministic evidence confidence matrix, recomputed straight from the
    # paired packet -- the same calculate_fusion_score() call that produced
    # the E_pool/P_agree/C_dir terms quoted in the rationale above, rendered
    # as a table rather than the fixed-width text block used in the prompt
    #-----------------------------------------------------------

    if (!is.null(packet) && length(packet$fragments) > 0) {
        fusion <- calculate_fusion_score(packet$fragments)
        cat('### Evidence Confidence Matrix\n\n')
        print(knitr::kable(fusion$matrix, format = 'markdown'))
        cat('\n\n')
        cat(
            '<div>',
            '<strong>E_pool:</strong> ', sprintf('%.2f', fusion$e_pool), ' &nbsp; ',
            '<strong>C_dir:</strong> ', sprintf('%.2f', fusion$c_dir), ' &nbsp; ',
            '<strong>P_agree:</strong> ', sprintf('%.2f', fusion$p_agree), ' &nbsp; ',
            '<strong>E_evidence:</strong> ', sprintf('%.2f', fusion$e_evidence), ' &nbsp; ',
            '<strong>lambda:</strong> ', sprintf('%.2f', fusion$lambda),
            '</div>\n\n',
            sep = ''
        )
    }

    #-----------------------------------------------------------
    # raw supporting evidence pulled from the paired packet
    #-----------------------------------------------------------

    cat('### Raw supporting evidence\n\n')
    if (is.null(packet) || length(packet$fragments) == 0) {
        cat('*No evidence packet found for this module.*\n\n')
        next
    }

    for (frag in packet$fragments) {
        cat('#### `', frag$fragment_id, '` (', frag$type, ')\n\n', sep = '')

        tbl <- findings_table(frag$top_findings)
        show_summary <- is.null(tbl) || nrow(tbl) == 0 || !(frag$type %in% redundant_summary_types)
        if (show_summary) cat(frag$compact_summary, '\n\n', sep = '')

        if (!is.null(tbl) && nrow(tbl) > 0) {
            cat('<div style="max-height: 250px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 15px;">\n\n')
            print(knitr::kable(tbl, format = 'markdown'))
            cat('\n\n</div>\n\n')
        }
    }
}
```
